title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Digital Products Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria or Pakistan, or perhaps in other restricted countries. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip won't let you collect payments, and you don't know which alternatives are trustworthy. You're stuck with no clear path to sell your ebooks, courses, music, or software. This post is for you – a straightforward comparison of your options to sell digital products without PayPal, no matter where you are in the world.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are well-known platforms for selling digital products, but they're not available in all countries. PayPal, for instance, restricts access in Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, citing 'local payment regulations' as the reason. Stripe has similar restrictions, while Gumroad blocks users in countries like Venezuela and Iran. Payhip excludes users in Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, citing 'payment processor requirements'. These platforms might seem like the obvious choices, but they're unavailable to creators in many countries. You need a PayPal alternative that actually works everywhere, not just in the Western world.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When these platforms restrict access in certain countries, it's often due to local payment regulations, banking limitations, or Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements. PayPal, for instance, claims that it's not allowed to operate in some countries due to local regulations. However, this doesn't mean you're restricted from selling digital products. A PayPal alternative like Core Shop Engine ($49.99) can bypass these restrictions by using a different payment processor – NOWPayments, for example, supports over 300 coins and doesn't require a KYC account.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, Core Shop Engine ($49.99) and NOWPayments offer a more transparent experience. With Core Shop Engine, you can set your prices, and customers pay in their preferred currency. NOWPayments handles the exchange rate, so you don't have to worry about hidden fees or conversion charges. This means faster payments, lower fees, and more control over your pricing strategy.
You're not restricted from selling digital products – you just need a PayPal alternative that works everywhere.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Core Shop Engine ($49.99) offers automated delivery capabilities, which means you can set up your digital products to be delivered instantly after payment. This removes the hassle of manual delivery and ensures that customers receive their products promptly. With Core Shop Engine, you can also track transactions, manage orders, and access real-time analytics through the Admin Dashboard – all part of the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99).
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When choosing a PayPal alternative, consider your specific situation. If you're looking for a platform that works everywhere, without any restrictions, Core Shop Engine ($49.99) is a good fit. If you want to sell digital products on a specific platform, like Gumroad or Payhip, but they're not available in your country, look for alternative payment processors like NOWPayments. Don't settle for a platform that restricts your access – explore options that give you the freedom to sell your digital products globally.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
PayPal alternatives like Core Shop Engine ($49.99) offer automated delivery, tracking, and real-time analytics, making it easier to sell digital products.
